## Objective
A high-level summary of what this epic achieves and what value it adds to Capsule.

## User Stories / Scope
List the core stories or modules covered under this epic:
- [ ] User Story 1
- [ ] User Story 2

## Linked Issues
List the individual sprint tasks that belong to this epic:
- #123: Task Title
- #124: Task Title

## Verification Plan
Detail how this entire epic will be validated end-to-end (e.g., specific E2E test flows, load tests).
